title: urochloa mollis
intro: Urochloa mollis, also known as Panicum molle, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Africa and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. Urochloa mollis is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
